mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces the I2S-planted concrete byte (color_type=0x03) with a <GAP> abstraction; structural recombination mutators then prevent the exact palette byte from being retained, so the single-byte fix that bare cmplog holds is erased.
one_line: structural generalization erases the I2S-planted palette color_type byte

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage abstracts the concrete tab byte (0x09) to a <GAP> placeholder and adds re-execution overhead; both effects destroy the byte-exact literal that I2S would retain, causing the tab gate to remain unresolved.
one_line: GeneralizationStage erases the exact tab byte and adds throughput cost

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage re-runs and structural recombination mutators spend executions on short, fragmented inputs that never advance the parser far enough to accumulate sufficient buffered content; cmplog's I2S plus havoc builds coherent long inputs that satisfy the buffer-ahead threshold.
one_line: structural energy tax produces short fragmented inputs that never fill the buffer
